Memory of the day: the way your name started feeling less like a name and more like a place I wanted to return to.
Memory of the day: every little conversation that somehow made the distance feel smaller.
Memory of the day: the first time I realized missing you could be painful and beautiful at the same time.
የዛሬ ትዝታ: ከአንቺ ጋር ማውራት ልቤን እንዴት እንደሚያረጋጋው።
Memory of the day: your smile living in my head rent-free, honestly very disrespectful of it.
Memory of the day: those small messages that turned a normal day into a day I wanted to keep.
Memory of the day: the moment I knew distance was going to be hard, but you were going to be worth it.
Memory of the day: us, somehow making love feel close even when the map says otherwise.
